ArgonTest.Name: Static/Instance Mixed
ArgonTest.InputSource:
import Ar._
trait MyTrait <: Any
static
public proc self.say_hello(): () do puts ''Hello'' end
instance
public proc self.say_world(): () do puts ''World'' end
end
constructor MyCtor(): MyTrait end
proc main(): () do MyTrait.say_hello() MyCtor().say_world() end
